overview: A college discovery platform where students can browse, search, and compare colleges side-by-side, save their favorites, and explore detailed information about each institution.
features: Browse and search 50+ colleges by name, location, and fees
Compare 2-3 colleges side-by-side with a detailed table
Full college detail pages with courses, placements, and reviews
Save favorite colleges with Internet Identity authentication
Responsive design with loading skeletons and empty states
